title: BEM-862 execute 861
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/protocols']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 11:58 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
route=load('governance/state/bem861_route_after_bem860.json')
rs=route.get('status','unknown')
resp=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem844_claude_response.md')
txt=read(resp)
created_files=[]
if rs=='process_response_next' and resp.exists():
    decision='UNKNOWN'
    up=txt.upper()
    if 'DECISION: APPROVED' in up: decision='APPROVED'
    elif 'DECISION: CHANGE_REQUIRED' in up: decision='CHANGE_REQUIRED'
    elif 'DECISION: BLOCKED' in up: decision='BLOCKED'
    protocol=Path('governance/protocols/BEM862_PROTOCOL_RESULT_FROM_CLAUDE_RESPONSE.md')
    protocol.write_text('# BEM-862 | Protocol Result From Claude Response'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Decision: '+decision+sep+sep+'Source: `governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem844_claude_response.md`'+sep+sep+'## Response'+sep+sep+txt[:8000]+sep)
    created_files.append(str(protocol))
    status='protocol_result_created'
    next_action='if BLOCKED/CHANGE_REQUIRED repair stated blocker; if APPROVED finalize protocol'
elif rs=='inspect_ensure_step_execution_next':
    wf=Path('.github/workflows/claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml')
    wtxt=read(wf)
    ensure_present='scripts/ensure_claude_response_file.py' in wtxt
    ensure_always='Ensure Claude response file exists' in wtxt and 'if: always()' in wtxt
    status='ensure_step_inspected'
    next_action='patch ensure step to execute before commit and verify commit includes response file' if not (ensure_present and ensure_always) else 'force direct repo-side fail-closed response because workflow step is present but no response committed'
elif rs=='dispatch_result_probe_queued' or rs=='runtime_probe_queued':
    status='probe_queued_wait_tick'
    next_action='fresh tick and verify probe'
else:
    status='unknown_route_execution'
    next_action='diagnose BEM-861 route and response file'
state={'bem':'BEM-862','status':status,'route_status':rs,'response_exists':resp.exists(),'response_preview':txt[:1600],'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem862_execute_bem861_route.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem862_execute_bem861_route.md').write_text('# BEM-862 | Execute BEM-861 Route | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem862_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-862'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem862_execute_bem861_route.json','governance/reports/bem862_execute_bem861_route.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem862_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed BEM-861 route by processing BEM-844 response into protocol or inspecting ensure-step execution')
"""
No issue comments.
